dataStudio.name: CookieScript
dataStudio.shortDescription: Analyze CookieScript banner analytics in Looker Studio.
dataStudio.description: Use this data source to import CookieScript banner analytics into Looker Studio. A CookieScript account and API key are required. Sign up at CookieScript, then generate your API key in the CookieScript dashboard and use it to connect your banner analytics data.
